pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Adds SwiGLU, value-residual+gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time training on thwu1 base to sharpen deep-layer signals before eval.
techniques: SwiGLU with gated attention + value residual per block
Exclusive self-attention in final layers with EMA shadow weights
AdamW test-time training on validation tokens
